835 - Values:
Value passed is  - {UID}- Uniqie for each file
Example - -dtBkcCHu9bkKu8O
Description: EDI file id
Defines the type of input file - API or File
Total no. of transactions/Record received in API/File

835 - Values: Input Filename of the EDI file received with filename extension
Description: Name of the input file received from source.

835 - Values: Input Filename of the EDI file archived in s3 with filename extension
Description: Name of the input file after archiving the input file.
Represent the name of the process stage which post the Audit point.
Represent the Intermediate or Final status of the process stage which posts the Audit point.
Specific information of a particular step after the process is completed.

835 - Values: Input Filename of the DFF file received with filename extension
Description: Name of the input Archive file of the process stage which posts the Audit point.
Comments: This field is required only if Edifecs is archiving the Input File

Description: Name of the output Archive file of the process stage which posts the Audit point.
Comments: This field is required only if Edifecs is archiving the Output File

835 - Values:
The time the audit trigger event got generated in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS format
Sample: 2024-08-05 00:24:16:480
Description: Auditing time of each audit point

835 - Values:
Shared as part of Summary file by Iplus Core team
Format: PaymentExtract_JobID_RayID_RecID_PaymentID
Sample: PaymentExtract_c5f8e2d9-4b6a-42d1-a3f7-9e01b5c3d7e8_a12f7b9d-3e4c-45f0-b8a6-71d9c25e0f34_f8d2a3b7-9c5e-42d1-b6a0-e71f4c0d95e2_62054
Description: Unique Identifier for the complete lifecycle of transaction/Record. Will be unchanged even the transaction is Split, passed across various system, reprocessed.

835 - Values:
Shared as part of Summary file by Iplus Core team
Format: PaymentExtract_JobID_RayID_RecID_PaymentID
Sample: PaymentExtract_c5f8e2d9-4b6a-42d1-a3f7-9e01b5c3d7e8_a12f7b9d-3e4c-45f0-b8a6-71d9c25e0f34_f8d2a3b7-9c5e-42d1-b6a0-e71f4c0d95e2_62054
Description: Unique Identifier for transaction level. Will be different when reprocess a same record.

835 - Values: Product - Can be editable by Implementation team to send their client Name.
Description: Unique identifier for the implementation team
Identifier to find from where we received(Starting point) the initial Transaction/Record.
Comments: Iplus Core team will be populating

Description: Place holder to add any specific Reference Identifier based on Business Requirement
This field indicates unique identifier for a transaction that has been retried
Unique identifier for the job, will be unchanged throughout the lifecycle of the job
Comments:
Use the 'JobID' from the Extract File name
ExtractName_JobId_RayId_RecId_PaymentId.dat

E.g.  PaymentExtract_c5f8e2d9-4b6a-42d1-a3f7-9e01b5c3d7e8_a12f7b9d-3e4c-45f0-b8a6-71d9c25e0f34_f8d2a3b7-9c5e-42d1-b6a0-e71f4c0d95e2_62054.dat

where,
ExtractName = PaymentExtract
JobId = c5f8e2d9-4b6a-42d1-a3f7-9e01b5c3d7e8
RayId = a12f7b9d-3e4c-45f0-b8a6-71d9c25e0f34
RecId = f8d2a3b7-9c5e-42d1-b6a0-e71f4c0d95e
PaymentId = 18002
